sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99460" key="sunaposu/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναπο-σύρω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n99460.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clean off also</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
